---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for BuahMusim
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: *"I'm always frustrated when I can't see price trends for more than 90 days..."*

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Does this appear in the Roadmap?

Check the [Roadmap section in README](../../README.md#️-roadmap) first. If yes, link to it here and add any additional context.

## Implementation Notes (optional)

If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented (API changes, data sources, UI approach), share them here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
